productDisplayName: Fila Men Racer New Black Sports Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Racer New running shoe comes in a low profile silhouette and is packed with features, making it a great buy for training purposes and casual wear.UpperHeavily meshed upper with strategically placed synthetic overlays for enhanced breathable comfort and enhanced shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced impact protection on the partially transparent heel unitOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle pattern and herringbone styled lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementCurved midfoot with a plastic trusstic shank for ergonomic comfortScooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfootShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
